metadata.description: Registry-first discovery, resolution, and validation over governed v2 skill definitions.
metadata.summary: List, search, resolve, get, inspect capability details, and validate governed skills with a dedicated CLI and reusable Rust API.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Search Skill Registry
capabilities.description: Search the governed skill registry by task or keyword and return ranked matches with context-budget hints.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text task or keyword query matched against skill names, aliases, keywords, triggers, and capability descriptions.

output.description: Ranked skill registry search results with match reasons, matched capabilities, and context cost estimates.

capabilities.name: Resolve Skill For Task
capabilities.description: Resolve the best matching skill and capability for a task without loading every full skill definition into context.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Task or intent description used to resolve the best matching governed skill and capability.

output.description: Resolve result with the top matching skill, top capability, and ranked alternatives.

capabilities.name: Validate Skill Format
capabilities.description: Validate one skill file or a directory of skill files against the governed v2 format plus registry invariants.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to a single skill definition JSON file.

parameters.name: dir
parameters.description: Path to a directory containing one or more skill definition JSON files.

output.description: Validation report with registry and contract-format issues.

constraints.description: This surface is the dedicated registry, resolution, and validation entrypoint for governed v2 skill definitions.

triggers.description: When an agent needs to search the governed skill registry for the right capability.
When an agent should resolve the best skill/capability for a task without loading all skill definitions.
When a skill definition or registry overlay needs built-in format validation.
